title: Adra Machan Visilu
subTitle: Three fans spend all their money on a movie star's films. When they ask the star for help, something surprising happens which leads to a plan for revenge.

title: Raj Melodies
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of popular hits composed by renowned singers and musicians is played to entertain listeners.

title: Bakthi Padalgal
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of melodious songs sung and composed by talented artists is played in order to invoke the spirit of devotion.

title: Namasaagar
subTitle: A religious scholar sheds light on the significance of spirituality and delivers a devotional discourse on Hindu mythologies.

title: Jesus Calls
subTitle: Religious leaders representing the church lead a session of prayer, after which devotees share their holistic experiences and the miracles they have witnessed.

title: Aalaya Dharisanam
subTitle: The host talks about the religious significance of various Hindu temples and sheds light on the presiding deities in these shrines.

title: Raj News
subTitle: The host presents information about the social, economic and political issues of the day and provides updates on current events.
